title: F5 security advisory (AV26-501)
description: On May 22, 2026, F5 published a security advisory to address a critical vulnerability in the following products:
products: F5 WAF for NGINX   versions 5.9.0 to 5.13.0
NGINX App Protect WAF   multiple versions
NGINX App Protect DoS   versions 4.3.0 to 4.7.0
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
